visual_description: A woman with blonde, wavy hair, wearing a dark sweater over a white collared shirt, is seen with her eyes closed and mouth slightly open. Behind her, a man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a striped sweater, looks toward her while seated at a table. Other people are visible in the background, seated and engaged in various activities within what appears to be a busy indoor public space.
